title: Junior Revenue Manager at dnata India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at dnata India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
dnata India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About dnata India South Asia Partners:
dnata India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India South Asia Partners!
